content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • S,Kramcnto, CA 95!114-2329 
Jon Mikels 
54549 Rosa Rd. 
Bandon, OR 97411-7200 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-12-121 
Dear Mr. Mikels: 
{916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 122-08!16 
August 13, 2012 
This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission 
has withdrawn your recent request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act 1 
as we discussed in a telephone conversation on August 9, 2012. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
BGL:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
 
By: 
Brian G. Lau 
Counsel, Legal Division 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 8 IOOO through 91014. All statutory 
references are to the Government Code. unless otherwise indicaled. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commbsion are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2. Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. unless otherwise indicated.

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no question or conclusion sections. Document confirms withdrawal of advice request per prior telephone discussion.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter from the FPPC confirming that Jon Mikels' request for advice under the Political Reform Act has been withdrawn following a telephone conversation on August 9, 2012.
